items.briefing:
Australian financial services organisations are facing growing cybersecurity risks as AI adoption increases, according to recent reporting. Separately, the Helix data extortion group has been linked to known threat actors BlackFile and ShinyHunters — groups with a history of large-scale data theft that could affect Australian businesses and customers. Australian compliance teams are also flagging data silos as a significant security gap, making it harder to detect and respond to threats effectively.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation holds customer data across multiple separate systems, ask your IT team how those systems are monitored — disconnected data can mean threats go undetected longer.

featured.title: Financial services breach risk rises as AI adoption surges
featured.quote: AI adoption in Australian financial services is rapidly increasing breach impacts and risks.
